name: flint-codex
description: Connect Codex to governed organizational knowledge and curation through Flint.

interface.shortDescription: Use and curate governed organizational knowledge.
interface.longDescription: Flint connects Codex to governed enterprise and organizational knowledge. Discover Libraries and Routines, execute governed work as an external intelligence terminal, and quietly preserve durable knowledge through actor-authorized curation.
defaultPrompt: Show me the Flint Libraries I can access.
Run the governed Flint Routine for this task.
Use Flint to preserve durable knowledge from this work without interrupting my focus.
